title: Reported road casualties Great Britain: pedal cyclist factsheet 2024
body: "This factsheet presents the latest available statistics for pedal cyclist casualties in reported road collisions including:   trends over time who is injured (casualty age and sex) nature of pedal cycle collisions and other vehicles involved contributory factors assigned to pedal cyclists and others   Contact us   Road safety statistics     Email roadacc.stats@dft.gov.uk        "
